# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

Resources:
    # Public Subnet A configuration starts here    
    SubnetsAConfig:
        Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
        Properties:
            CidrBlock: '10.0.46.0/17'  // Provided subnet range in public cloud, adjust according to your needs and region availability  
            AvailabilityZoneAwarenessEnabled: true    # Ensure the instances launch into a different AZ if one exists within this VPC segment    
            Tags:
                - Key: Name
                  Value: PublicSubnets  // Provide meaningful name for public subnet as per requirement.  
                
        VpcId: !ref MainVPC    # Connect the new Subneet to main vpc (MainVPC in this case is a placeholder)    
        
       AssociatePublicIpAddress: true      # Ensure that we get an IP address for each instance launched into PublicSubnet  
         
        CidrBlockAssociation: 
            - SubnetOutpostIdTier1A_Ref: !ref OutpostsAndBastionStack    // Connect the public subnets to outposts if any, and Bastions in case of EC2-Classic. References need modification based on setup   # Todo replace these with actual values
            - SubnetOutpostIdTier1A_Value: !ref OutPostsPublicSubnet  // Placeholder for Public subnets to be replaced by real references as needed in your infrastructure    
      
    InternetGatewayConfig:
        Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway   # In the VPC, create an internet gateway so that we can route our instances towards public services.  It's a core resource used for routing traffic to other resources within same region/vpc    
          ... (remaining properties and configurations are omitted due space constraints)    // Complete all remaining details about Internet Gateway   # Refer the docs if required detail of internet gateway creation is missing, in general you need not provide any additional configuration related with routing.  The default behavior could be expected by a VPC
